mapper.select: SELECT AT.target_id , AT.table_name , AT.table_column , AT.description , ( SELECT STRING_AGG(KCU.column_name, ',' ORDER BY KCU.ordinal_position) FROM information_schema.table_constraints TC JOIN information_schema.key_column_usage KCU ON TC.constraint_name = KCU.constraint_name AND TC.table_schema = KCU.table_schema WHERE TC.table_schema = '${schema}' AND TC.table_name = AT.table_name AND TC.constraint_type = 'PRIMARY KEY' ) AS "pkColumnsCsv" FROM audit_target AT WHERE AT.del_yn = TRUE ORDER BY AT.table_name, AT.table_column
